/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/lib CMakeFiles/test_advanced_join.dir/test_advanced_join.cpp.o -o test_advanced_join  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/envs/general/lib student_build/libdataframelib.a /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/envs/general/lib/libparquet.1900.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/miniconda/base/envs/general/lib/libarrow.1900.0.0.dylib
